summary: Iteration 84 - StoresListPage Region Zoom Filter feature testing completed. All backend and frontend tests passed. The feature adds country/region filtering with dynamic dropdowns and map zoom functionality.
passed_tests: BACKEND: /api/config/regions returns 16 countries
BACKEND: Spain (ES) has 19 regions including AN and CT
BACKEND: All countries have correct structure (name + regions array)
BACKEND: /api/stores returns all 3 stores
BACKEND: /api/stores?country=ES returns 3 Spanish stores
BACKEND: /api/stores?country=ES&region=AN returns 1 store (Artisan Foods Co)
BACKEND: /api/stores?country=ES&region=CT returns 2 stores (Anacondafoods)
BACKEND: All stores have country and region fields
BACKEND: Non-existent country filter returns empty list
BACKEND: /api/store/artisan-foods-co returns store with region data
FRONTEND: Country dropdown shows countries grouped by optgroup
FRONTEND: Region dropdown is disabled when no country selected
FRONTEND: Selecting Spain populates region dropdown with 20 options (All + 19 regions)
FRONTEND: Selecting Spain in map view zooms map to España (z=6)
FRONTEND: Selecting Andalucía in map view zooms map further to Andalucía (z=8)
FRONTEND: Changing country resets region selection
FRONTEND: Clear filters button resets both country and region
FRONTEND: Grid view shows store cards correctly
FRONTEND: Map view toggle works
FRONTEND: Mobile filter panel is collapsible
FRONTEND: Mobile country/region filters work same as desktop
critical_code_review_comments: StoresListPage.js: GoogleMapEmbed component correctly uses regionName and countryName props for zoom behavior
Backend config.py: REGIONS_BY_COUNTRY has 16 countries as expected
Backend stores.py: GET /stores correctly filters by country and region query params
Store data has country and region fields properly populated
Country dropdown uses optgroup for grouping by continent region (Europa, Americas, etc.)

test_credentials.not_needed: No authentication required for stores page

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 84 verified the StoresListPage region zoom filter feature. The page now has: 1) Country dropdown with optgroups (Europa, Americas, Asia y Oceania, Africa y Oriente Medio), 2) Region dropdown that dynamically populates based on selected country, 3) Map zoom functionality that zooms to country (z=6) and further to region (z=8), 4) Mobile filter panel is collapsible. Currently 3 stores exist in Spain: Artisan Foods Co in Andalucía (AN), 2x Anacondafoods in Cataluña (CT). Backend /api/config/regions returns 16 countries with their administrative regions.

feature_verification.country_dropdown_optgroups: Countries grouped by: Europa (22 codes), Americas (11 codes), Asia y Oceania (10 codes), Africa y Oriente Medio (7 codes)
feature_verification.region_dropdown_dynamic: Populates with country's regions when country selected, disabled otherwise
feature_verification.map_zoom_country: Zooms to country name with z=6 parameter
feature_verification.map_zoom_region: Zooms to 'regionName, countryName' with z=8 parameter
feature_verification.store_filtering: Backend correctly filters by country and region query params
feature_verification.clear_filters: Resets both country and region to empty
feature_verification.mobile_collapsible: Filter panel toggles visibility on mobile
